title: Day 23 Reflection
description: Post-reflection on your production refactor — what improved, what you can now explain, and what to sharpen before tomorrow's mock interview.

prompts.question: Which project did you refactor and why? List the top three structural changes you made.
prompts.guidance: Be specific: folder names, extracted components, new hooks.

prompts.question: Which performance optimizations did you apply vs skip? What did Profiler show?
prompts.guidance: Document measure → change → result for each, or honest skip reason.

prompts.question: Summarize your architecture doc: why this folder structure, why Context/Redux/RTK Query/Router?
prompts.guidance: Write as if answering Round 4 on Day 24.

prompts.question: Which of the 8 senior interview questions was hardest? What is your improved answer now?
prompts.guidance: Name the question and rewrite your answer in 3–4 sentences.

prompts.question: What one gap remains before tomorrow's mock interview? How will you address it tonight?
prompts.guidance: One focused action — not a vague study everything plan.
